column1: Identify key strengths and weaknesses across C-level and department head staff to establish areas of work
column5:
Communication is spotty and erratic. Key elements of clarity are missing around core details such as:
• roles and remits
• clarity between roles
• consistency of decision making
• most critically, clarity on vision and overall direction of the game, which needs to be addressed
 the department has had no existing forum that was just for them. They were not in a place to challenge and support each other in a healthy way.
Establishing the leads meeting has been met positively across department leads. They adapted to the hiring process quickly. They are fairly open about what's working well and what's not.
The current sense of ownership is still a little tentative and will take time to establish but is already growing.
So far they're a great group of people to work with.
